repo.description: Enriching MS-COCO with Chinese sentences and tags for cross-lingual multimedia tasks

terms.context_snippet: COCO-CN is a bilingual image description dataset enriching MS-COCO with manually written Chinese sentences and tags. The new dataset can be used for multiple tasks including image tagging, captioning and retrieval, all in a cross-lingual setting.
